jobs.name: openrouter-watchdog
jobs.description: Collects balance and usage from OpenRouter every hour. Zero external dependencies.

jobs.name: openrouter-anomaly-analyzer
jobs.description: Checks for anomalies and produces a report. [SILENT] when nothing to report (no delivery).

jobs.name: openrouter-daily-brief
jobs.description: Optional daily summary of balance and 24h spend. Enable only if the owner wants this feature.

jobs.name: openrouter-anomaly-analyzer-ru
jobs.description: OPTIONAL — Russian-language analyzer with RUB conversion. Only for Telegram-style delivery.
